title: Railway RRB Junior Engineer JE CEN 05/2025 CBT II Exam Date 2026

Those candidates who are Enrolled in This Vacancy Can Check the Application Status, Exam Date, Mock Test Link. Read the notification for RRB Junior Engineer JE 2026 eligibility, post information, selection procedure, Details, age limit, pay scale and all other information. application_fee: General / OBC / EWS : 500/- SC / ST / PH : 250/- All Category Female : 250/- After Appear the Stage I Exam General/OBC/EWS Fee Refund: Rs. 400/- SC / ST / PH / Female Refund : Rs. 250/- Pay the Examination Fee Through Cast at E Challan or Debit Card, Credit Card, Net Banking RRB JE Junior Engineer
eligibility: Read the Notification. RRB JE Junior Engineer Exam 2025: Category Wise

text_sections.section: How to Fill RRB JE Junior Engineer Recruitment Online Form 2025
text_sections.content: RRB JE Junior Engineer Recruitment for Various Post Candidate Can Apply Between 31/10/2025 to 10/12/2025 | Candidate Read the Notification Before Apply the Recruitment Application Form in RRB JE Junior Engineer Recruitment 2025. | Kindly Check and Collect the All Document - Eligibility, ID Proof, Address Details, Basic Details. | Kindly Ready Scan Document Related to Recruitment Form - Photo, Sign, ID Proof, Etc. | Before Submit the Application Form Must Check the Preview and All Column Carefully. | If Candidate Required to Paying the Application Fee Must Submit. If You have Not the Required Application Fees Your Form is Not Completed. | Take A Print Out of Final Submitted Form.
